# AVIATOR Project Setup Complete

## ✅ Project Overview
- **Name**: AVIATOR - FlightDeck Task Automation System
- **Technology**: Next.js 14 with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- **Purpose**: Enterprise-grade FlightDeck task automation and monitoring

## ✅ Completed Tasks
- [x] Project structure created with Next.js and TypeScript
- [x] Comprehensive AVIATOR application built with all required features
- [x] No additional extensions required
- [x] Dependencies installed successfully
- [x] Development server task created and running
- [x] Project launched with `npm run dev`
- [x] Complete documentation provided in README.md

## 🚀 Next Steps
1. The application should now be running at `http://localhost:3000`
2. Open the browser to access the AVIATOR interface
3. Configure your order details and start automating FlightDeck tasks
4. Use the Task Configuration section to customize automation rules

## 📋 Key Features Implemented
- **Automated Task Processing**: Completes ready/assigned tasks automatically
- **Real-time Monitoring**: Live task status updates and progress tracking
- **Configuration Management**: User-friendly task rule configuration
- **Multi-environment Support**: Test 1, Test 2, Test 4 environments
- **Workgroup Integration**: Dynamic workgroup loading and selection
- **Field Mapping System**: Configurable mandatory field values
- **Retry Logic**: Smart failed task handling with retry mechanisms
- **Professional UI**: Modern React interface with Tailwind CSS

The AVIATOR application is fully functional and ready for FlightDeck task automation!
